definitions.slope_bp: Implied 1M SONIA rate (Dec-27) minus implied rate (Dec-26), in bp. Futures quoted 100 − rate; rates computed in % then scaled to bp.
definitions.basis_bp: Dec-26 futures implied rate minus spot SONIA fixing, in bp (cash–futures basis).
definitions.roll_corr_30: 30-business-day rolling correlation of daily slope change (bp) vs Brent daily % return.
definitions.basis_vol_ann: 30-day rolling stdev of daily basis changes (bp), annualised ×√252.
definitions.vs_bank_bp: Implied futures rate minus current BoE Bank Rate (3.75%), in bp. Positive = market prices SONIA above policy (fewer cuts / higher rates); negative = cuts priced.

sources.futures: Barchart EOD settles (ICE 1M SONIA JUZ26 / JUZ27)

dec26.label: Dec-2026
dec26.summary: 33.0 bp above Bank Rate — fewer cuts / higher SONIA priced

dec27.label: Dec-2027
dec27.summary: 46.5 bp above Bank Rate — fewer cuts / higher SONIA priced

policy_pricing.incremental_summary: Dec-27 implied +46.5 bp vs Bank Rate; Dec-26 +33.0 bp — back-end +13.5 bp above front.

cumulative_through_dec27.definition: Total hiking/cuts priced through Dec-27 = Dec-27 implied minus Bank Rate. Split: Dec-26 portion (Dec-26 vs Bank) + Dec27−Dec26 increment (calendar slope).

current.summary: +46.5 bp through Dec-27: Dec-26 +33.0 bp (71.0% of total) + Dec27−Dec26 +13.5 bp (29.0%).

entry.summary: +46.0 bp through Dec-27: Dec-26 +42.5 bp (92.4% of total) + Dec27−Dec26 +3.5 bp (7.6%).

change.summary: Total +0.5 bp · Dec-26 portion -9.5 bp · Dec27−Dec26 +10.0 bp.

corr_history.note: Full JUZ26∩JUZ27 overlap (64 sessions). First 29 sessions have no 30d rolling correlation.
